opsec.config.title: OpSec Settings
opsec.packstrip.mode.manual.tooltip: Default vanilla behavior on push. You can still toggle any server pack
opsec.packstrip.mode.ask.tooltip: Server resource pack not applied but with consent screen to ask if the pack(s) should be applied
opsec.packstrip.mode.alwaysOn.tooltip: Server resource pack not applied by default. You can still toggle any server pack
opsec.packstrip.title: Server Resource Pack
opsec.packstrip.required: This server has a required resource pack.
opsec.packstrip.optional: This server has an optional resource pack.
opsec.packstrip.stripped: §7OpSec bypassed this pack's content. You may apply it below.
opsec.account.addSession.tooltip: Add a new account using a session token
opsec.account.addOffline.tooltip: Add an offline account (username only, no auth)
opsec.update.title: OpSec Update Available
opsec.update.message: A new version of OpSec is available!
opsec.tamper.title: OpSec Integrity Warning
opsec.tamper.mismatch: The running jar does not match the official release.
opsec.tamper.malicious: This may indicate the file has been modified with malicious code.
opsec.tamper.compromised: §cYour computer may have already been compromised.
opsec.tamper.action: §cIf you did not modify this file yourself, take immediate action.
